normalized_block:
## FINDINGS
VERDICT: REJECT
1. bank.py:19-22 (transfer/_debit/_credit) — Refactor reorders operations so `_debit(src, ...)` mutates and logs the source balance before `_credit(dst, ...)` validates that `dst` exists, breaking the documented atomic "either both balances change or neither does" guarantee: a transfer to a nonexistent account now leaves the source account permanently debited while raising KeyError.
2. bank.py:19-22,44-49 — `history()`/`entry_count()` semantics changed from one `("transfer", src, dst, amount)` log entry per transfer to two separate `("debit", ...)`/`("credit", ...)` entries, silently doubling entry growth and changing tuple shape for any existing consumer of the log format.
